title: Assistant Store Manager - Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates:
Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates!
